product_overview: Cipher Playground is a futuristic web application for encoding, decoding, and learning classic and modern ciphers. It combines an interactive playground, scanner tools, user dashboard, and educational content into a single cryptography-focused experience.
core_goals: Provide an intuitive interface for encoding and decoding text with multiple cipher algorithms
Support multi-layer cipher workflows for advanced experimentation
Offer a dashboard for users to review activity and quick actions
Enable scanner-based decoding for camera or image inputs
Teach users cipher concepts through lessons and quizzes

features.name: Landing Page
features.description: A futuristic entry page that introduces the product with visual effects, hero content, and feature highlights.
user_flows: GET / -> Receive 200 with the landing page, hero typing animation, and feature sections -> User navigates to /playground for interactive encoding
GET / -> Receive 200 with the landing page -> If page assets fail to load, display a degraded landing experience without interactive animation

features.name: Cipher Playground
features.description: The core encoding and decoding experience where users choose cipher algorithms and apply single or multi-layer transformations.
user_flows: GET /playground -> Receive 200 with the cipher playground UI -> User selects one or more cipher algorithms -> User enters text and submits an encode/decode action -> Receive transformed output in the playground
GET /playground -> Receive 200 with the cipher playground UI -> User submits an unsupported cipher or invalid input -> Receive validation feedback or an error state in the interface

features.name: Dashboard
features.description: A user activity overview that surfaces statistics, history, and quick actions for recent cipher usage.
user_flows: GET /dashboard -> Receive 200 with the dashboard view -> User reviews statistics and recent history widgets -> User selects a quick action to continue a prior workflow
GET /dashboard -> Receive 200 with the dashboard view -> If activity data is unavailable, show an empty or fallback dashboard state

features.name: Scanner
features.description: A decoding tool for camera or image-based cipher capture, designed for live scanning workflows.
user_flows: GET /scanner -> Receive 200 with the scanner interface -> User starts a scan using the camera or image input -> Scanner processes the captured content and returns decoded text
GET /scanner -> Receive 200 with the scanner interface -> User attempts live camera decoding -> Receive a placeholder or not-yet-implemented state because live camera decoding is incomplete

features.name: Learning Hub
features.description: An educational section with cipher lessons and interactive quizzes to help users learn cryptography concepts.
user_flows: GET /learn -> Receive 200 with the learning hub content -> User opens a cipher lesson -> User completes an interactive quiz and receives feedback
GET /learn -> Receive 200 with the learning hub content -> User submits an invalid quiz response or navigates without selecting a lesson -> Receive validation prompts or an instructional error state

features.name: Landing Page
features.description: Futuristic landing page with hero typing animation and feature highlights.

features.name: Cipher Playground
features.description: Core encoding and decoding interface with algorithm selection and multi-layer support.

features.name: Dashboard
features.description: User activity overview and quick-action widgets.

features.name: Learning Hub
features.description: Educational section with cipher lessons and interactive quizzes.

known_limitations.impact: Live camera decoding is not yet fully implemented.
